title: Speaking - Part 4
description: The examiner will ask you questions related to the theme from Part 3. Express and develop your opinions with your partner.

content.task: Discussion on poverty, welfare and social support.

questions.question: Do you think social welfare systems discourage people from finding work, or do they provide a vital safety net? What is your view?
Is it possible to eliminate poverty entirely, or is a certain level of inequality inevitable in any society? What gives you your view?

script.text: Do you think social welfare systems discourage people from finding work, or do they provide a vital safety net? What is your view?
Thank you. That is the end of the test.
